articles.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Kuwait reports missile and drone attacks
articles.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

articles.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
articles.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

articles.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
articles.summary: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

articles.title: Huge blast kills dozens in rebel-held village in Myanmar
articles.summary: Insurgents say it was caused by explosives being used for mining close to the Chinese border.

articles.title: Five patients recover from Ebola in DR Congo and leave hospital
articles.summary: Those infected can get better and officials stress that people should seek medical help if they have symptoms.

articles.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
articles.summary: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.

articles.title: Poland's controversial 'Highway to Hel' 666 bus revived
articles.summary: Poland's seaside resort called Hel is getting its 666 bus service back, despite earlier opposition from Christian groups.

articles.title: Litterbugs now face on-the-spot fines in Tokyo's tourist hotspot
articles.summary: Dozens of officials will patrol world-famous Shibuya as Japan responds to the impacts of overtourism.

articles.title: Ethiopia election under way, but not everyone can vote
articles.summary: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's party is expected to dominate the election as conflicts overshadow the vote.

articles.title: Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival
articles.summary: Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.
